cards.title: High Intensity Bond
cards.description: The relationship forms under strong emotional convergence and early significance.

cards.title: Volatile Attachment Loop
cards.description: The relationship repeatedly cycles through closeness, rupture, and repair.

cards.title: Fragile Trust Structure
cards.description: Trust is vulnerable to relatively small disturbances because symbolic meaning is unevenly distributed.

cards.title: Dependency Risk
cards.description: Emotional reliance on the bond may be outpacing healthy autonomy.

cards.title: Restricted Emotional Access
cards.description: One or both partners become difficult to reach during emotional activation.
